Description: All around the world!
Actual Requirements: Either kill or get killed by a mob

Description: Pick a flower for someone special

Advancement Name: There's a zombie on the lawn
Description: Find a sunflower plains
Find a flower forest
Parent: There's a zombie on the lawn

Description: Find a Cherry Grove
Collect all types of flowers
Obtain an Eyeblossom from a Pale Garden
Actual Requirements: Obtain either a Closed Eyeblossom or Open Eyeblossom

Description: Smash a Creaking Heart to destroy its Creaking
Actual Requirements: Destroy a Creaking Heart while it has an alive Creaking bound to it

Description: Pick off a Resin Clump growing on the side of a Pale Oak tree
Craft all forms of Resin Blocks and Resin Bricks
Actual Requirements: Obtain: Block of Resin, Resin Bricks, Resin Brick Slab, Resin Brick Stairs, Resin Brick Walls, Chiseled Resin Bricks

Description: Place a block of Pale Moss next to a block of regular Moss
Actual Requirements: Can also place Moss next to Pale Moss. The blocks must be touching in any of the six directions

Description: Place a Creaking Heart with the correct alignment between two Pale Oak Log blocks
Place fifty Creaking Hearts and inundate yourself with an absolute nightmare
Actual Requirements: Have 50 Creakings within 40 blocks of you

Description: Go for a safari in the jungle
Actual Requirements: Enter any jungle biome (including bamboo jungle biomes)

Description: Swing (or climb) on some vines
Feed an Ocelot fish to try and gain its trust
Breed a baby ocelot
Notes: "Lion Tamer" - Tame an ocelot - was removed in 1.6

Description: Break down some bamboo
Craft and use some scaffolding
Place scaffolding to the world limit
Actual Requirements: Place scaffolding at y=319 in the Overworld or y=255 in the Nether or End

Description: Breed two pandas to get a baby panda
Get beaten up by an angry panda
Enter a Modified Jungle Edge - the rarest biome in Minecraft
Notes: Originally added in 1.10 Beta Build 6, then removed in 1.10 Beta Build 9

Description: Breed a rare brown panda
Actual Requirements: Breed two pandas and have the offspring be a brown panda

Description: Feed cake to every type of panda
Actual Requirements: Have all seven panda personalities pick up cake that you dropped on the ground

Description: Slip and slide on some ice
Fall into some Powder Snow
Actual Requirements: Enter a block of powder snow

Description: Walk on Powder Snow… without sinking in it
Actual Requirements: Walk on powder snow while wearing Leather Boots

Description: Get completely frozen inside two blocks of Powder Snow for a loooong time. Big question is: Can you do this all day?
Actual Requirements: For 20 minutes in a row, stand inside two blocks of Powder Snow (one at your feet, one at your head) without wearing any leather armor (such that you're taking damage from freezing)

Description: Pick up some Powder Snow in a Bucket
Use a silk touch pickaxe to pick up some ice blocks
Break down an ice spike using a silk touch pickaxe
Craft or mine a blue ice block from an iceberg
Obtain a stack of every type of ice in your inventory
Actual Requirements: Obtain 64 ice, 64 packed ice, and 64 blue ice

Description: It may be illegal to hunt polar bears in real life, but not in Minecraft

Advancement Name: We’re Going on a Bear Hunt
Description: Get hunted by a Polar Bear
Actual Requirements: Get killed by a polar bear

Description: Go for a swim
Find an ocean
Craft and ride a boat to sail on the high seas
Actual Requirements: Enter a boat or chest boat

Description: Dive into water from a cliff at least 50 blocks tall
Actual Requirements: Fall at least 50 blocks and land in water

Description: Stay underwater for 2 minutes
Spend a day underwater
Ride a Boat with a Chest in it
Give a Dolphin something to play with
Actual Requirements: Have a Dolphin nudge an item that you threw

Description: Get a speed boost from your friendly underwater companions
Feed a dolphin fish to have it lead you to treasure

Advancement Name: So Long & Thanks For The Fish
Description: Get murdered by dolphins
Come across a coral reef in the ocean
Collect some sea pickles from a coral reef
Collect some coral from a coral reef
Actual Requirements: Obtain dead or living coral, coral fan or coral block in any color

Description: Collect all colors of coral blocks, plants and fans (including dead ones)
Enter a bubble column
Explore some Underwater Ruins
Come across a sunken ship
Get in a boat within a shipwreck
Actual Requirements: Start riding a boat that is inside a shipwreck

Description: Find a shipwreck in an iceberg biome
Actual Requirements: Enter a Shipwreck in a Frozen Ocean or Deep Frozen Ocean biome

Description: Use a treasure map to find Buried Treasure
Actual Requirements: Open a Buried Treasure chest for the first time

Description: Construct a Conduit in the ocean
Notes: Known as "Power of the Ocean" until 1.9, when it was renamed after its Bedrock counterpart

Description: Travel at least 1000 blocks from the centre of the world in any direction. It's not that far in real life
Actual Requirements: Travel beyond 1000 or -1000 in the x or z direction

Description: Travel at least 10,000 blocks from the centre of the world in any direction. A journey that long begins with a single step
Actual Requirements: Travel beyond 10000 or -10000 in the x or z direction

Description: A hundred kilometres!
Actual Requirements: Travel beyond 100000 or -100000 in the x or z direction

Description: Discover every forest biome
Discover every dry biome
Discover every snowy biome
Notes: Formerly known as "Snow Feet" until 1.13 Alpha Build 1

Description: Discover every overgrown biome
Discover every mountain biome
Notes: Formerly known as "Cold Feet" until 1.13 Alpha Build 1

Description: Discover every water biome
Discover each type of surface biome in the Overworld
Actual Requirements: Enter at least one biome of the following categories:
